description: User views the H5 renewal optimization page
required_properties: user_id, anonymous_id, platform, timestamp, plan_id, renewal_status, source
success_criteria: Event count aligns with page analytics
validation_notes: Compare client event count with server page logs
privacy_notes: Do not include raw payment details

success_criteria: Benefit exposure can be compared to CTA behavior
validation_notes: Validate viewport trigger and duplicate suppression
privacy_notes: No personal benefit usage details unless aggregated

description: User clicks primary renewal or payment update CTA
required_properties: user_id, platform, timestamp, plan_id, renewal_status, cta_type
validation_notes: Check one event per click and correct cta_type

description: User starts payment update from renewal flow
required_properties: user_id, platform, timestamp, plan_id, renewal_status, payment_status_category
validation_notes: Confirm event fires before secure payment handoff
privacy_notes: Payment method type only; no card number

required_properties: user_id, platform, timestamp, plan_id, renewal_status, payment_status_category
validation_notes: Validate with payment service success callback
privacy_notes: Payment method type only; no card number

trigger: Payment service returns failure or user cannot complete
required_properties: user_id, platform, timestamp, plan_id, renewal_status, failure_category
validation_notes: Validate category mapping with payment service

description: User renews successfully after failure or risk state
trigger: Server confirms successful renewal after recovery flow
required_properties: user_id, platform, timestamp, plan_id, previous_renewal_status, recovery_source
privacy_notes: No raw transaction or payment details

description: User clicks terms cancellation or refund policy link
validation_notes: Check link_type values for terms cancellation refund

description: User sees an error or ineligible state
validation_notes: Validate each state maps to allowed error_category
